description: Verify a zk-TLS attestation and extract revealed transcript
requires: native module (cd native && npm run build)

request.attestation: string (required) — serialized attestation JSON from prove backend

output.valid: boolean — whether the attestation is valid
output.serverName: string — server hostname from the attestation

error_output.error: string — 'native binding required — build native/ with: cd native && npm run build'
